MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT PICK-YOUR-PART AUTO WRECKING dba THE CITY TOW Motion To Strike Allegations From Plaintiff's Complaint and Demurrer To Complaint:
APPEAR: James T. Diamond, Jr., Esq. 510/267-0900 for pltf & opposing party; Marcelle Suzanne Strauss, Esq. 949/752-2444 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling (DEFENDANTS MOTION TO STRIKE ATTORNEYS FEES AND PUNITIVE DAMAGES PRAYER GRANTED; DEMURRER TO SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION AS CURRENTLY PLED SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS BARS THE PROSECUTION OF SUCH A CAUSE OF ACTION BY PLAINTIFF. DEMURRER TO 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO ADEQUATE BASIS IN FACT OR LAW SET FORTH FOR INDEMNIFICATION) with the exception that the second cause of action is sustained with leave to amend, and in addition, the motion to strike is also with leave to amend. Pltf has 15 days to amend. (302/AJR/KS(EX)) Court Reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
